PowerShell($routes = @\("/login", "/register", "/dashboard", "/analyze", "/feedback", "/onboarding"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$r -> $\($res.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$r -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($apiRoutes = @\( @{url="/api/profile"; method="GET"}, @{url="/api/analyses"; method="GET"}, @{url="/api/results"; method="GET"}, @{url="/api/analyze-face"; method="POST"} \); foreach \($r in $apiRoutes\) { try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000$\($r.url\)" -Method $r.method -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $json = $res.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "$\($r.method\) $\($r.url\) -> $\($res.StatusCode\): $\($res.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80,$res.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { $sc = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Host "$\($r.method\) $\($r.url\) -> $sc \(expected auth error\)" } })
